latin: Hic est dies quo Iacobum Passerem paene cepit! sed pirata semper effugit. naves sequuntur, milites currunt, sed Iacobus cum rhombo suo in solis occasum navigat.

questions.prompt: What always happens when they try to catch Jack?
Where does Jack sail at the end?
questions.target: Into the sunset with his rum
choices: Into the sunset with his rum
To the bottom of the sea

translation: This is the day you almost caught Jack Sparrow! But the pirate always escapes. Ships pursue, soldiers run, but Jack sails with his rum into the sunset.
